evals.prompt: 帮我把这篇论文加到Notion里 https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.12345
evals.expected_output: Claude guides the user to use 'uv run paper-tool add <url>' command, mentions the --debug and --stream flags, and explains that the pipeline will download PDF, extract text, render figures/tables, run LLM analysis, and write to Notion.
expectations: Explains the pipeline steps or points to relevant sections of the skill

evals.prompt: 论文的图表渲染失败了，table显示的是matplotlib降级版本，很难看。怎么调试？
evals.expected_output: Claude uses the skill to guide the user through the LaTeX debugging workflow: check debug/ artifacts, use debug-table.sh to isolate the table, identify the failure from the log, apply the fix pattern from latex-failure-patterns.md, and verify with --force --rerender-tables.
expectations: Mentions debug-table.sh script to isolate the table
Explains how to re-import after fixing (--force --rerender-tables)
Mentions regression verification on previously-working papers

evals.prompt: 我有一个markdown文件里面有20篇论文链接，想全部导入Notion。但有些可能会失败，我不想半路停下来。
evals.expected_output: Claude suggests 'paper-tool batch <file> --continue-on-error', explains it will skip failures and keep going, and mentions that failed papers can be debugged individually afterward with --debug.
expectations: Explains how to re-run individual failures with --debug
References the batch workflow from the skill
